properties.name: scim.base-path
properties.description: Base URL path for all SCIM endpoints.

properties.name: scim.bulk.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bulk Operations (RFC 7644 §3.7) — allows clients to batch multiple create/update/delete operations into a single HTTP request, reducing round-trips for large provisioning jobs.

properties.name: scim.bulk.max-operations
properties.description: Maximum number of individual operations allowed in a single bulk request.

properties.name: scim.bulk.max-payload-size
properties.description: Maximum payload size (bytes) for bulk requests (default: 1 MB).

properties.name: scim.filter.enabled
properties.description: Enable Filtering (RFC 7644 §3.4.2.2) — allows clients to query resources using expressions like 'userName eq "john"' or 'emails[type eq "work"]'.

properties.name: scim.filter.max-results
properties.description: Maximum number of resources returned by a filtered query.

properties.name: scim.pagination.default-page-size
properties.description: Default number of resources returned per page when the client doesn't specify 'count'.

properties.name: scim.pagination.max-page-size
properties.description: Maximum allowed page size — the server caps the client's 'count' parameter to this value.

properties.name: scim.etag.enabled
properties.description: Enable ETags (RFC 7644 §3.14) — optimistic concurrency control using If-Match / If-None-Match headers to prevent lost updates when multiple clients modify the same resource.

properties.name: scim.patch.enabled
properties.description: Enable PATCH Operations (RFC 7644 §3.5.2) — partial resource updates (add/remove/replace individual attributes) without replacing the entire resource.

properties.name: scim.sort.enabled
properties.description: Enable Sorting (RFC 7644 §3.4.2.3) — allows clients to sort search results using 'sortBy' and 'sortOrder' query parameters.

properties.name: scim.client.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the remote SCIM Service Provider — when set, auto-configures a ScimClient bean.

properties.name: scim.client.connect-timeout
properties.description: TCP connection timeout for the SCIM client.

properties.name: scim.client.read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout for the SCIM client.

properties.name: scim.persistence.enabled
properties.description: Enable the OOTB JPA persistence adapter — stores SCIM resources in a relational database.

properties.name: scim.persistence.table-name
properties.description: Database table name for SCIM resource storage.

properties.name: scim.persistence.schema-name
properties.description: Database schema name (e.g., 'scim') — if set, the table is qualified as schema.table.

properties.name: scim.persistence.auto-migrate
properties.description: Run Flyway migration on startup to create the scim_resources table automatically.

properties.name: scim.idp.provider
properties.description: Identity Provider type: keycloak, okta, azure-ad, ping-federate, auth0 — auto-configures the corresponding IdentityResolver.

properties.name: scim.idp.client-id
properties.description: Client ID for Keycloak client-role extraction.

properties.name: scim.idp.namespace
properties.description: Auth0 custom namespace for role claims (e.g., https://your-app.auth0.com).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.subject
properties.description: JWT claim name for the subject (principal identifier).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.email
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's email address.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.name
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's display name.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.roles
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's roles.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.groups
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's groups (used by Okta and PingFederate).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.custom
properties.description: Additional custom claim name overrides for IdP-specific claims (e.g., realm-access, object-id, permissions). Keys use kebab-case; values are the JWT claim names.
